statements.notes:
KSM-66 Ashwagandha Root
Ksm-66 Ashwagandha is the best and strongest root-only ashwagandha extract in the world. Backed by 22 "Gold Standard" human clinical trials, KSM-66's title as the best is indisputable. KSM-66's primary function is to support hormone health.
100% pure KSM-66 Ashwagandha
Accelerated 1,000mg/day serving

Purchased factory-direct from India
We offer a 1,000mg/day serving via 2 500mg capsules for accelerated support.

Made the Traditional way
The Ashwagandha roots are soaked in milk prior to processing to help activate and bind the active components - as has been done for thousands of years.
These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.

About Brain Forza
Brain Forza has specialized in making the best organic mushroom and adaptogen powered products since 2010.
Above all, we prioritize quality and science. We are driven by our goal to make the most functional super supplements on the market.
Find us and tag us online
@brainforza #brainforza
Made in the USA

Pure KSM-66 Ashwagandha root extract
Brain Forza's pure KSM-66 Ashwagandha root extract directly imported material

Dietary Supplement
Suggested Use: Take 1 capsule twice daily or, 2 capsules once daily with a glass of water. Food optional.
Allergens: Contains traces of milk. Manufactured in a facility that processes wheat, gluten, soy, milk, egg, shellfish and tree nut ingredients.
